finding_title: watchdog only reports stale lock and lacks provably safe recovery

watchdog_gate.live_owner_policy: block even when lease appears stale
watchdog_gate.dead_owner_policy: safe takeover only after lease expiry through claim_leased_item fencing path
watchdog_gate.active_lease_policy: block while lease_until_ms is greater than now_ms
